description_long: This modern bungalow is set within a walled rectangular plot featuring a large green lawn and a paved driveway leading to a black gate. The structure is composed of two main volumes: a single-story section with a flat roof and a two-story section with a tan facade. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the rear and side elevations, providing ample natural light and views of the backyard, which includes a swimming pool, patio, and several palm trees. The front facade is more private, with smaller windows and a prominent driveway. The backyard is designed for leisure, with outdoor seating, a pool, and landscaped greenery. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with a focus on open spaces and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a mix of single and two-story sections, large windows, a pool, and landscaped yard within a walled plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and a mix of single and two-story sections with a private facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large glass windows, pool, patio, and outdoor living spaces with palm trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the single-story section, smaller windows, and the expanse of the green lawn.
description_view_3: Alternate front/side view emphasizing the driveway, garage entrance, and the geometric layout of the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on rear and side facades
